commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; no blocking findings remain, so this PR only needs maintainer review and normal check/merge gates.; Cleared: The diff changes CLI cleanup behavior, tests, and docs only; I found no concrete secret, dependency, workflow, or security-boundary regression. (sha=0c3609b7394fd68e2ea003fc57df6206b5a54370)
commands.review_summary:
The PR routes prewarm Actions hydration, probe, and ready-pool registration failures through bounded SSH lease cleanup, adds regression tests, splits lease cleanup helpers, and documents the cleanup behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows prewarm creates a kept lease, then hydrate and probe failures return without cleanup; the PR body also reports after-fix AWS failure smokes with zero matching leases afterward.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; no blocking findings remain, so this PR only needs maintainer review and normal check/merge gates.

target.title: fix: release failed prewarm leases
target.body:
## Summary

- release newly created SSH leases when Actions hydration, probe execution, or ready-pool registration fails
- use a bounded cleanup context independent of caller cancellation
- preserve delegated-provider lifecycle ownership and fall back to coordinator release-by-ID when inspection fails
- document cleanup behavior and manual recovery guidance

Reported by @coygeek.

## Verification

- `go test -race ./...`
- `go vet ./...`
- `bash scripts/check-docs.sh`
- `go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox`
- branch autoreview: clean

## Live proof

- AWS on-demand `t3.small`: injected probe exit 17; automatic release completed; follow-up inventory found zero matching leases
- AWS on-demand `t3.small`: injected Actions hydration failure with a missing workflow; automatic release completed; follow-up inventory found zero matching leases
- AWS on-demand `t3.small`: repeated probe-failure smoke after review fix; automatic release completed; follow-up inventory found zero matching leases

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/479
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
